title.rendered: Solar Turbines & TTT Business Review For 2018

content.rendered:
On the Wednesday – October 31 – 2018, Solar Turbine & Thuong Thien Technology Company held a seminar to review the business in Vietnam for the year 2018.

On behalf of Solar Turbine Company, there were Mr. Richard Mundy – Managing Director of Asia-Pacific, Mr. Daryl Wang – Regional Service Manager, Mr. Anthony Jones – New Sales Manager, and many other Solar Turbine specialists.

On behalf of Thuong Thien Technologies Company (TTT), there were Mr. Truong Dinh Hoe – President, Mr. Sepand Zarrabi – Vice President, and other specialists and managers from TTT.

The seminar was successful when both of companies have a great opportunity to review and evaluate business in 2018. Roughly, Solar Turbines revenue in 2018 equals to $29 million dollars. This is one of the peak years in sales since 2014 with many projects coming from aftermarket services section. However, there are still some limitation points for both sides that need to be improved. Throughout the seminar, the both companies have successfully discussed with each other for the remaining issues in 2018 and lay down guideline for business planning in 2019.

The team also has commended for individuals who spent a lot of effort and contributed the most to the company’s success in 2018.

In the same occasion of SPE Golf Tournament event in Vietnam, Solar Turbines and TTT have strengthen relationship with customers by spending time playing golf with customers.
